case_title: SILVA, JOHN vs. SALCEDO, AMALIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALCEDO, AMALIA LOPEZ, JOE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 390 EDINBURGH STREET #2 S.F,, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT SALCEDO, AMALIA LOPEZ, JOE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALCEDO, AMALIA LOPEZ, JOE

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SALCEDO, AMALIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-1998 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, CALENDAR OF OCT-02-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER W/10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER.PREV.PARTY TO PREPARE ORD CONSISTENT WITH THIS CRT'S RULING.
ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT - GRANTED - JUDGE GARCIA.
